channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Texas QB Quinn Ewers declares for NFL draft as program ushers in Arch Manning era
item.description: Texas junior quarterback Quinn Ewers has declared for the NFL draft, ending a Longhorns career in which he led the program to a Big 12 championship and twice to the College Football Playoff but was not always embraced by a fan base eagerly waiting for Arch Manning to take over.
item.dc:creator: Jim Vertuno, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Iowa State's 30-year streak of hitting a 3-pointer ends in win over Texas Tech
item.description: Iowa State's NCAA record streak of 945 consecutive games with a 3-pointer ended Tuesday night in a 71-58 victory over Texas Tech. The Cyclones had made a 3-pointer in every game dating back to Feb. 19, 1995, at Colorado when the school was still part of the Big Eight.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Deion Sanders has 'legit' chance of coaching Cowboys but under specific conditions, Super Bowl champ says
item.description: After Deion Sanders seemed to at least entertain the idea of coaching the Dallas Cowboys, his former teammate said he thinks there is a "legit" chance it happens.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Dakar Rally comes down to a duel in the sand between Lategan and Al-Rajhi
item.description: Henk Lategan and Yazeed Al-Rajhi will duel in the Saudi sand for their first Dakar Rally title after swapping the lead for a second straight day.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Australian Open: Naomi Osaka is back in a Slam's 3rd round for the 1st time in 3 years
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Naomi Osaka's second-round match at the Australian Open could not possibly have started in a worse way. All of 21 minutes in, she sailed a forehand service return well long and, just like that, trailed 5-0.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Banned NBA player texted gamblers during games about playing status, court docs say
item.description: Court documents revealed that banned NBA player Jontay Porter texted co-conspirators about his playing status, hinting to bet he would underperform.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Australian Open 2025: How to watch on TV, betting odds and more to know
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Get caught up on the Australian Open with a guide that tells you everything you need to know about how to watch the year’s first Grand Slam tennis tournament, what the betting odds are, what the schedule is and more: How to watch the Australian Open on TV — In the
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Novak Djokovic breaks a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches in tennis history
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Novak Djokovic added yet another record to his lengthy list, breaking a tie with Roger Federer for the most Grand Slam matches played in tennis history by reaching 430 on Wednesday at the Australian Open in what was a tougher-than-expected second-round victory.
item.dc:creator: HOWARD FENDRICH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Prep roundup: Alec Blair comes up clutch, leads No. 3 De La Salle over No. 4 San Ramon Valley
item.description: St. Ignatius boys, girls win Bruce Mahoney games at Chase Center. Mitty boys win home WCAL game over rival Bellarmine. Riordan overpowers Serra.
item.dc:creator: Nathan Canilao, Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Montreal skates past Utah Hockey Club, 5-3
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club's season-long 7-game homestand is not going well. Utah lose for the third time in four games at the Delta Center, falling to the Montreal Canadians Tuesday night, 5-3.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: As fires ravage Los Angeles, Tiger Woods isn't sure what will happen with Riviera tournament
item.description: PALM BEACH GARDENS, Fla. (AP) — Tiger Woods isn't sure what's going to happen with next month's Genesis Invitational, the PGA Tour event that he hosts in the fire-ravaged Pacific Palisades neighborhood of Los Angeles. He's insisting there should be far bigger concerns.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NCAA to dole out $1.2B to help pay for House settlement. Its president asks for Congress to step in
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Stressing his own organization's ability to pay out $1.2 billion over 10 years to help settle an industry-changing lawsuit, NCAA President Charlie Baker also urged Congress to pass legislation that could put college sports on a better path.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Man accused of stalking Caitlin Clark proclaims himself 'guilty as charged' in 1st court appearance
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — One day after Michael Thomas Lewis was charged with felony stalking of Indiana Fever star and WNBA rookie of the year Caitlin Clark, the 55-year-old Texas man shouted “guilty as charged” as soon as he sat down in a courtroom Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Olympic kite surfer credits God after rescuing drowning woman in Atlantic Ocean
item.description: Brazilian Olympian Bruno Lobo rescued a drowning woman and gave all the credit to God for putting him in position to perform the heroic deed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami coach pushes back on 'bulls---' narrative Cam Ward quit on his team after setting touchdown record
item.description: Cam Ward drummed up criticism after not playing the second half of the Pop-Tarts Bowl, but his head coach, Mario Cristobal, came to his defense.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Former Cowboys Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are among names floated as club's next coach
item.description: Deion Sanders and Jason Witten are two of Dallas Cowboys owner Jerry Jones' former — and favorite — players, and both have been floated as potential replacements for coach Mike McCarthy. Jones and McCarthy agreed Monday to part ways after five seasons together.
item.dc:creator: SCHUYLER DIXON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Canadiens' Emil Heineman is out 3-4 weeks after getting hit by a car while walking in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montreal Canadiens player Emil Heineman is expected to miss three to four weeks after being hit by a car while walking in downtown Salt Lake City a day before playing at the Utah Hockey Club.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ohio State has slowly paced itself on offense all the way to the national championship game
item.description: Ohio State has been purposely pacing itself on offense all season, huddling more and trying to limit the number of snaps in each game of what the Buckeyes hoped and anticipated would be a long run. “I know it sounds crazy, the huddle, it’s almost like going back in time,” coach Ryan Day said.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Italian soccer club Lazio fires falconer for posting photos of his penis implant
item.description: ROME (AP) — Lazio has fired the man who handled the Italian soccer club’s eagle mascot after he posted photos and videos online of his own prosthetic penis.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Montréal Canadiens hockey player struck by car while in Salt Lake City
item.description: Montréal Canadiens hockey player Emil Heineman will be sidelined for several weeks after he was struck by a car in Salt Lake City.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Oakland Coliseum buyers closing in on Alameda County’s approval of massive sale
item.description: AASEG promises to transform the property into a new hub of restaurants, retail, housing, entertainment and live sports.
item.dc:creator: Shomik Mukherjee, The Mercury News

item.title: Patrick and Brittany Mahomes welcome third child
item.description: Brittany Mahomes gave birth to the couple’s third child, a girl named Golden Raye Mahomes, on Jan. 12, the couple announced on social media.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Lamar Jackson and Josh Allen will face off for a berth in the AFC championship game
item.description: Lamar Jackson vs. Josh Allen won’t decide the NFL MVP next week. The stakes are higher with a spot in the AFC championship game on the line.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Texans get 2 points on blocked extra point return vs. Chargers, 1st in NFL playoff history
item.description: Houston's D'Angelo Ross returned a blocked extra point for two points in the fourth quarter of the Texans' wild-card playoff victory over the Los Angeles Chargers on Saturday — the first such play in NFL postseason history.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Devin Booker scores 34 in Suns' 114-106 win over Jazz
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) - Devin Booker scored 34 points and the Phoenix Suns never trailed in a 114-106 victory over the Utah Jazz on Saturday. Booker had 22 points in the first half on 7-of-8 shooting, including 4 of 5 from 3-point range. He finished 12 for 20 overall and 6 for 12 from behind the arc.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: BYU loses third straight, falling at TCU, 71-67
item.description: FORT WORTH, Tex. (ABC4 Sports) - The BYU basketball team has hit a funk at the beginning of the Big 12 Conference season. In a back-and-forth battle in Fort Worth, the Cougars fell 71-67 to TCU for its third straight loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Santa Anita postpones weekend racing as track is staging area for fire relief efforts
item.description: A flareup of the wildfire on the west side of Los Angeles that prompted new evacuations has caused Santa Anita to cancel horse racing this weekend.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Lindsey Vonn impresses skiing into 6th place in her first World Cup downhill race since 2019
item.description: The racecourse commentator broadcasting Lindsey Vonn's first World Cup downhill race since 2019 — the American is age 40 and has a titanium knee — summed up how impressive the ski great's performance was.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses to Stanley Cup champs, 4-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club continues to struggle at home, losing its fourth straight game at the Delta Center Wednesday night to the defending Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers, 4-1.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams could be calling Arizona home for Monday's playoff game
item.description: The National Football League announced a potential change to the Vikings-Rams playoff game scheduled for Monday night at SoFi Stadium in Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Tony Kurzweil, KTLA 5

item.title: Independent streak helped build Notre Dame into football's historic and now modern behemoth
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — It was some combination of religion, a grudge involving Knute Rockne and maybe the simple notion that some people just don't like Notre Dame.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
